name: Planet Hollywoods Captain Crunch Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs Chicken breast - cut into 1-oz. tenders
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely grind or crush the two cereals and set aside.
2. Beat the egg with milk and set aside.
3. Stir together the flour, onion powder, garlic powder, and black pepper. Set this aside as well.
4. Dip the chicken pieces into the seasoned flour mixture, coating them well. Shake off any excess flour.
5. Dip the chicken into the egg wash, ensuring it is fully coated. Then, dip into the cereal mixture, coating well.
6. Heat oil in a large heavy skillet to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Carefully drop the coated chicken tenders into the hot oil and cook until golden brown and cooked through, about 3 to 5 minutes depending on size.
8. Drain on paper towels and serve immediately with creole mustard sauce.
